title: Get the Fuck Out of My Life
lyrics: Hey, how's it going, ready for this one, yeah, can we see what we mean, I think so, alright, go ahead, alright, uh, uh, me, me, you hit it off first, alright, here it comes, yeah You came in sideways through a heaven of dreams, had a gun in your skin, saying, trust me, I'll let you stay, past the warning signs, gave you keys to a piece, you couldn't find, you're talking circles, rest was fate, every promise to the blame, I was building something quiet, and soon you would just pass the door, I don't need revenge, I need space, don't need answers, I chase space, but we're doing fair, who I am, I finally understand, yeah, uh, you learned to hold me right before I break, call it death, but it's just what you take, every time I rose, you fell, that's why you leaned on me, so I stalled you, don't miss me, you missed control, missed the access to my soul, I was healing while you slept, kept the wounds I never kept, I don't hate you, I released every version you used to be, no more ghosts in my phone, no more calling it home, no, hey, I got one thing to say to you, and you just better listen, cause you know it's damn true, girl, hey, I said, why don't you go in, and get the fuck out of my life, forever, yeah, said it, come, said it, clean, my ass up, there's that, why don't you go, and get the fuck out of my life, forever, forever, yeah, I try patience, I try grace, try loving you in every phase, what you don't want, learn peace, you want place, shit, rest your case, not your faith, let you silence over lies, choose my future, choose my spine, this ain't who it is, it's time to leave it here, I crossed the line, I crossed that line, with you, yeah, why don't you go, go, go, go on, say it once, read it, and go let it settle, I don't owe you nothing, not ever, ever, ever, say it once, read it, and go let it settle, I don't owe you nothing, not ever, ever, ever, ever, so yeah, yo, why don't you go in, get the fuck out of my life, forever, yeah, I said, why don't you go in, just get the fuck out of my life, forever, yeah, no heat just like where you were, don't look back, no blood forever, no heat in my chest, just like where you were, don't look back, no blood forever, so why don't you go in, get the fuck out of my life, forever, baby, why don't, what, what do you mean, no one's going to pay the light bill, what, what, no, no, no, can you come back, can you come back, please, can you come back,

lyricsSegments.text: Hey, how's it going, ready for this one, yeah, can we see what we mean, I think so, alright, go ahead, alright, uh, uh, me, me, you hit it off first, alright, here it comes, yeah

You came in sideways through a heaven of dreams, had a gun in your skin, saying, trust me, I'll let you stay, past the warning signs, gave you keys to a piece, you couldn't find, you're talking circles, rest was fate, every promise to the blame, I was building something quiet, and soon you would just pass the door, I don't need revenge, I need space, don't need answers, I chase space, but we're doing fair, who I am, I finally understand, yeah, uh, you learned to hold me right before I break, call it death, but it's just what you take, every time I rose, you fell, that's why you leaned on me, so I stalled you, don't miss me, you missed control,

missed the access to my soul, I was healing while you slept, kept the wounds I never kept, I don't hate you, I released every version you used to be, no more ghosts in my phone, no more calling it home, no, hey, I got one thing to say to you, and you just better listen, cause you know it's damn true, girl, hey, I said, why don't you go in, and get the fuck out of my life, forever, yeah,

said it, come, said it, clean, my ass up, there's that, why don't you go, and get the fuck out of my life, forever, forever, yeah, I try patience, I try grace, try loving you in every phase, what you don't want, learn peace, you want place, shit, rest your case, not your faith, let you silence over lies, choose my future, choose my spine,

this ain't who it is, it's time to leave it here, I crossed the line, I crossed that line, with you, yeah, why don't you go, go, go, go on, say it once, read it, and go let it settle, I don't owe you nothing, not ever, ever, ever, say it once, read it, and go let it settle, I don't owe you nothing, not ever, ever, ever, ever, so yeah, yo, why don't you go in,
get the fuck out of my life, forever, yeah, I said, why don't you go in, just get the fuck out of my life, forever, yeah, no heat just like where you were, don't look back, no blood forever,

no heat in my chest, just like where you were, don't look back, no blood forever, so why don't you go in, get the fuck out of my life, forever, baby, why don't, what, what do you mean, no one's going to pay the light bill, what, what, no, no, no, can you come back, can you come back, please, can you come back,
